title: Parallel independent deliveries
summary: Two or more non-overlapping coder lanes dispatched from one frozen base.
useWhen: Two or more independent implementation surfaces
avoidWhen: Surfaces share files or have hidden interaction risk

phases.intent: Confirm workspace binding and that each surface is independently bounded.
Dispatch each coder lane with its own delivery spec from the same base.
evidence: Each lane has bounded allowed paths

phases.intent: Observe all lanes via run_wait until each reaches terminal.
evidence: Each lane terminal or liveness observed
adaptations: Stop a runaway lane without aborting siblings

phases.intent: Verify that independent deliveries compose correctly before acceptance.
adaptations: Tester only when interaction risk exists

phases.intent: Review each delivery and decide accept or reject per lane.
adaptations: Reject one lane without rejecting all

escalation.advisor: Only for one named cross-lane design question.
escalation.auditor: Only for one named composition-risk acceptance question.
